blocks.text: `internal/agentbridge/detectutil` is the shared detection helper for concrete provider adapters. Env override is a pin, not a hint: if the override path is absent or not a regular file, detection fails closed and does not fall back to PATH.

items: Override path candidate when `RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH` is set.
Process `PATH` candidates when no override exists.
Login-shell `PATH` candidates read once per process with timeout.

blocks.text: `ResolveExecutableCandidates` returns no-override candidates in PATH order. Concrete adapters decide whether to probe one or several candidates. `RIIDO_OPENCLAW_PATH` remains a pin even when the pinned executable is too old or invalid.

Detect-selected executable path is capability snapshot execution evidence. `bridge.Run` and `runtimeactor.Submit` pass it into `StartRequest.Executable`; concrete provider adapters must not reinterpret it from PATH.
